scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['.astro','node_modules/.astro']) fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('public/scripts',{recursive:true}); for (const f of fs.readdirSync('../tools').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.ps1'))) { fs.copyFileSync('../tools/'+f,'public/scripts/'+f); console.log('copied tools/'+f+' -> public/scripts/'+f); }"
